search_candidates.query: KRYA Bangun Karya Perkasa Jaya Tbk. annual report 2025 pdf official
search_candidates.title: Annual Report 2025 - Kerry Group
search_candidates.content: 2025 was a year of strong market outperformance, in which we continued to strategically evolve our business, through the development of our biotechnology solutions and taste capabilities, by expanding our manufacturing footprint in emerging markets, and by strengthening our customer innovation centre network globally. Our taste and nutrition strategy is underpinned by the deployment of our leading taste and biotechnology capabilities to address customer and consumer needs across food and beverage markets. Our biotechnology capabilities comprise core sciences that deliver impact into our taste, enzyme, proactive health, food protection, preservation and bio-pharma portfolios.
